user.title: Bin Alternation
user.description: Configure the alternating bin sensor (every other week, ISO week parity). Default schedule: put the bin out Wednesday evening, collection Thursday morning.

data.name: Sensor name
data.jaune_sur_paire: The yellow bin falls on even weeks
data.jour_sortie: Day to put the bin out
data.heure_sortie: Hour from which to put the bin out (0-23)
data.exceptions: Special days (one per line: YYYY-MM-DD annulation | YYYY-MM-DD report YYYY-MM-DD [Colour])

init.title: Edit Bin Alternation
init.description: Edit the settings, collection schedule and special days.
